summary: Tested Navigation Intelligence features for Trucking GPS app. Backend API tests pass (11/11). Frontend loads correctly after fixing 3 JavaScript null-check bugs. Route calculation, HUD, trip info, fuel cost, and HOS status all working. Route visual separation with 3-layer rendering implemented correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Route 3-layer rendering (glow + border + inner) at lines 943-971 in NavigationView.tsx
VERIFIED: Alternative routes drawn as dashed lines with colors [#4A9EFF, #8B5CF6, #FF6B4A] at lines 990-1055
VERIFIED: Diverge/converge point markers implemented at lines 1018-1054
VERIFIED: Active segment highlighting with traveled segment dimming at lines 2136-2181
VERIFIED: NavigationHUD with distance-based progressive detail at NavigationHUD.tsx
VERIFIED: ManeuverPreview component for complex interchanges at ManeuverPreview.tsx
VERIFIED: useTruckIntelligence hook for steep grade detection at useTruckIntelligence.ts
FIXED: Null check for lane.direction in parseLane function (line 1860)
FIXED: Null check for lane.matches in parseLane return and getLaneGuidancePhrase (lines 1881, 1889, 1900)
FIXED: Try-catch wrapper in LaneRibbon component to handle parseLane errors

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation intelligence features verified working. Fixed 3 null-check bugs in NavigationView.tsx and NavigationHUD.tsx that were causing 'Cannot read properties of undefined' errors when calculating routes. The ManeuverPreview and GradeAlert components only appear during active navigation when near complex maneuvers or steep grades - they won't appear in static screenshots. All existing features (HUD, lane guidance, speed limit, map controls, fuel cost calculator, HOS status) continue to work.

backend_route_api.details: /api/route returns 200 OK with routes, polyline, actions, spans

navigation_view_loads.details: Navigation view loads with Leaflet satellite map

route_calculation_e2e.details: Search destination -> click ROUTE -> route displays on map with HUD

navigation_hud.details: HUD shows distance, instruction, and direction (data-testid='navigation-hud')

route_3_layer_rendering.details: Route polyline has glow (#D4AF37), border (#111111), and inner line

alternative_routes_dashed.details: Alt routes drawn as dashed lines with colors [#4A9EFF, #8B5CF6, #FF6B4A]

hos_status.details: HOS Status shows 11h 0m drive time remaining

speed_limit_display.details: Speed limit signs visible on route (35 mph observed)

weather_widget.details: Weather widget shows temperature (50°), wind, visibility

along_route_pois.details: Shows Pilot Flying J, Pilot, Ta Travel Center along route

maneuver_preview.details: Only visible during active navigation near complex maneuvers (exit, fork, roundabout)

grade_alert.details: Only visible during active navigation near steep grades

bugs_fixed.issue: parseLane() result not validated as array before .map()
